channel.title: CWE-94 on ZAP
channel.description: Recent content in CWE-94 on ZAP

item.title: Avoid eval with string literals
item.description:
Detects dynamic execution of attacker-controlled strings in JavaScript sinks such as eval(), Function(), string-based timers, execScript, or script.text assignments. Exploiting these flows lets attackers execute arbitrary JS without relying on HTML injection.

Generated by OWASP PTK SAST Module

item.title: Avoid execScript dynamic execution
item.description:
Detects dynamic execution of attacker-controlled strings in JavaScript sinks such as eval(), Function(), string-based timers, execScript, or script.text assignments. Exploiting these flows lets attackers execute arbitrary JS without relying on HTML injection.

Generated by OWASP PTK SAST Module

item.title: Avoid Function constructor with strings
item.description:
Detects dynamic execution of attacker-controlled strings in JavaScript sinks such as eval(), Function(), string-based timers, execScript, or script.text assignments. Exploiting these flows lets attackers execute arbitrary JS without relying on HTML injection.

Generated by OWASP PTK SAST Module

item.title: Avoid string-based timers
item.description:
Detects dynamic execution of attacker-controlled strings in JavaScript sinks such as eval(), Function(), string-based timers, execScript, or script.text assignments. Exploiting these flows lets attackers execute arbitrary JS without relying on HTML injection.

Generated by OWASP PTK SAST Module

item.title: DOM-based JavaScript Injection (taint flow)
item.description:
Detects dynamic execution of attacker-controlled strings in JavaScript sinks such as eval(), Function(), string-based timers, execScript, or script.text assignments. Exploiting these flows lets attackers execute arbitrary JS without relying on HTML injection.

Generated by OWASP PTK SAST Module

item.title: Dynamic template compilation
item.description:
Detects dynamic client-side template compilation/rendering where attacker-controlled templates or outputs are injected into the DOM.

Generated by OWASP PTK SAST Module

item.title: eval() from storage/referrer taint
item.description:
Storage/referrer taint reached eval().

Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: Function.apply() from storage/referrer taint
item.description:
Storage/referrer taint reached Function.apply().

item.title: Function() from storage/referrer taint
item.description:
Storage/referrer taint reached Function constructor.

item.title: Lit unsafeHTML taint flow
item.description:
Detects dynamic client-side template compilation/rendering where attacker-controlled templates or outputs are injected into the DOM.

Generated by OWASP PTK SAST Module

item.title: React dangerouslySetInnerHTML taint flow
item.description:
Detects dynamic client-side template compilation/rendering where attacker-controlled templates or outputs are injected into the DOM.

item.title: Review Vue v-html template usage
item.description:
Detects dynamic client-side template compilation/rendering where attacker-controlled templates or outputs are injected into the DOM.

Generated by OWASP PTK SAST Module

item.title: Server Side Code Injection - ASP Code Injection
item.description: A code injection may be possible including custom code that will be evaluated by the scripting engine.

item.title: Server Side Code Injection - PHP Code Injection
item.description: A code injection may be possible including custom code that will be evaluated by the scripting engine.

item.title: setInterval(string) from storage/referrer taint
item.description:
Storage/referrer taint reached setInterval(string).

Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: setTimeout(string) from storage/referrer taint
item.description:
Storage/referrer taint reached setTimeout(string).

item.title: Template injection (taint flow)
item.description:
Detects dynamic client-side template compilation/rendering where attacker-controlled templates or outputs are injected into the DOM.

item.title: Template output injected into DOM
item.description:
Detects dynamic client-side template compilation/rendering where attacker-controlled templates or outputs are injected into the DOM.
